title: castanopsis lamontii var. lamontii
intro: Castanopsis lamontii var. lamontii is a plant species of the family Fagaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions of Taiwan and Southeast Asia. It is also known as the Taiwan chinquapin or Taiwanese chinquapin. The medicinal properties of Castanopsis lamontii var. lamontii include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant's health benefits include its use in traditional medicine to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and its herbal preparations often involve infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress.
